name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Zone Registry

zones.zone_purpose: Declare governed chamber boundary before any posture reasoning begins.
zones.allowed_future_role: Frame workbench as governed evidence chamber with non-verdict posture.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Upload prompt, scanner header, try-it-now CTA, detector hero.
zones.conceptual_role: declares the chamber boundary before any reasoning begins
zones.hoax_identity_function: makes clear that Hoax.ai structures evidence posture rather than detecting truth
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: hero CTA, upload prompt, scanner header, try-it-now interface
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Display artifact description and type context without subject judgment.
zones.allowed_future_role: Place artifact before subject in future interface layout.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Subject profile card, accusation form, claim verdict box.
zones.conceptual_role: places the artifact before the subject
zones.hoax_identity_function: keeps reasoning attached to evidence condition
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: accusation form, subject profile card, claim verdict box
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Display bounded source and provenance context with confidence limits.
zones.allowed_future_role: Show source trace and provenance shadow as confidence-limiting context.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Source certification badge, verified stamp, truth meter.
zones.conceptual_role: shows source trace and provenance shadow as limiting factors
zones.hoax_identity_function: makes missing origin visible without converting absence into falsehood
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: verified badge, trust score, source certification banner
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Surface information gaps that constrain posture description.
zones.allowed_future_role: Register missing context as uncertainty register entries.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Incomplete scan error, failed detection state.
zones.conceptual_role: registers missing context before any output is shown
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: error state, incomplete upload warning, failed analysis alert
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Display governed posture state progression without scoring trajectory.
zones.allowed_future_role: Show posture-state architecture as governed progression.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Progress bar to verdict, score trajectory, fake/real pipeline.
zones.conceptual_role: shows posture states rather than score trajectory
zones.hoax_identity_function: embodies posture-state architecture instead of detector pipeline
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: progress to result, score meter, classification pipeline
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Display refusal and boundary actions as governance, not errors.
zones.allowed_future_role: Show refusal gate and boundary rail as governed protection.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Red error alert, blocked request frustration, access denied theatrics.
zones.conceptual_role: turns refusal into governance rather than error
zones.hoax_identity_function: shows that Hoax.ai protects against unsafe certainty
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: error alert, red failure, blocked request frustration pattern
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Preview contained output envelopes without verdict gravity.
zones.allowed_future_role: Contain future outputs in labeled envelope boxes.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Final result card, verdict banner, authenticity certificate.
zones.conceptual_role: contains allowed outputs within bounded envelope preview
zones.hoax_identity_function: prevents posture language from becoming verdict language
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: final result card, verdict banner, authenticity certificate
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

zones.zone_purpose: Display suggested verification questions as guided path, not final verification.
zones.allowed_future_role: Show verification path as question list without certification.
zones.forbidden_future_role: Verify now button, confirmed badge, truth confirmation CTA.
zones.conceptual_role: offers verification path without claiming final verification
zones.hoax_identity_function: guides inquiry without simulating detection authority
zones.generic_ui_pattern_to_avoid: verify now button, confirmed checkmark, truth confirmation CTA
zones.non_authorization_statement: This zone does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.
